dsl_rule.translation_notes: Long bottom shadow detected by comparing lower_wick to body size. Close significantly higher than low indicates support found and price arrested. Exit when price closes below previous close (reversal signal). Parameters shadow_length, pullback_magnitude, body_color, and body_size marked AUTHOR_SILENT were not numerically specified, so conservative defaults applied. Used lower_wick (bar property) to identify the long tail at the bottom of the candle.

backtest_rule.reason: Long bottom shadow detected by comparing lower_wick to body size. Close significantly higher than low indicates support found and price arrested. Exit when price closes below previous close (reversal signal). Parameters shadow_length, pullback_magnitude, body_color, and body_size marked AUTHOR_SILENT were not numerically specified, so conservative defaults applied. Used lower_wick (bar property) to identify the long tail at the bottom of the candle.

source_rule_text: A long bottom shadow candle signals an expected move to higher levels, indicating that buyers arrested a falling price and support was found.
